description: Create a Talon voice command module for searching and inserting official 2024 ICD-10-CM medical codes from a CSV file located at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\icd10_codes.csv (columns: 'Code', 'Description'). Develop the module within C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\icd_assistant\ using two files. The first, icd_assistant.py, must define a Talon Module named 'icd_assistant' that loads the CSV into memory and implements two actions: icd_search(query: str), which displays the top 3 case-insensitive description matches using app.notify, and icd_insert(query: str), which types the code of the single best match using actions.insert(). The second file, icd_assistant.talon, must map the voice commands "diagnosis search <user.text>" and "diagnosis insert <user.text>" to these respective actions.
